idea-plugin.name: Project2LLM
idea-plugin.description:
Seamless Codebase Packaging for Large Language Models

Project2LLM is an elegant developer tool designed to bridge the gap between your IntelliJ project directory and your LLM chatbot windows. No more copying files one-by-one or running complex external shell scripts to share code context.

Key Features:

  • Zero-friction Drag & Drop: Select files, folders, or entire modules in the Project View tree and drop them directly into external apps (ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Slack, etc.) to instantly bundle them into a single, beautifully structured text document.
  • Smart Drag Detection: Keeps internal file moves and refactoring within IntelliJ completely normal, only triggering context generation when dragging files outside the IDE.
  • Velocity Template Customization: Take full control over how your files are presented to LLMs. Customize metadata headers, directory tree formats, source code wraps, and more.
  • App & Project Settings Profiles: Create multiple formatting profiles. Save them globally across your IDE or lock specific configurations directly to individual projects.
  • Oversized & Binary Safe-Guards: Custom stubs replace binary assets and overly large text documents (exceeding configurable thresholds) to protect your LLM token budget.
  • Robust .aiignore Support: Use simple glob patterns inside custom .aiignore files to skip dependencies, build caches, and sensitive keys.

action.description: Packages the selected files and directories into a structured context text payload directly to the clipboard
